channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Decoding EEG Signals to Explore Next-Word Predictability in the Human Brain
item.description: EEG decoding shows next-word predictability effects on N400 responses are stronger for content words than function words.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Classifier That Teaches Itself: Self-Improving, Frozen-gate Training (SIFT) for Dynamic Document Classification
item.description: SIFT is a self-improving document classifier combining cheap sparse encoding with LLM escalation, learning from production feedback while maintaining safety guardrails.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Convolution for Large Language Models
item.description: Adding lightweight depthwise convolutions to Transformer attention improves LLM performance across benchmarks with less than 0.01% parameter increase.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Building a European Multilingual Evaluation Dataset: The MMLU Localisation Project within the EMT Network
item.description: The Directorate-General for Translation and European Master's in Translation localized MMLU dataset into 11 European languages for improved multilingual LLM evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Relay-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Multi-Domain Reasoning Chains
item.description: Relay-Bench evaluates LLMs on multi-domain reasoning using composite problems across seven domains, with GPT-5.5 xHigh scoring 43.3%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Computational models of pragmatic reasoning with flexible generation of meaning and expression alternatives
item.description: SAGE combines generative language models with cognitive models to computationally model how speakers and listeners reason about pragmatic alternatives.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Using Fine-Tuned LLMs to Identify Indicators of Vulnerability in UK Police Incident Logs
item.description: Researchers adapted fine-tuned LLMs to identify mental health, substance misuse, and homelessness indicators in UK police logs, finding LLM outputs require human correction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] PathReportEval: A Systematic Benchmark for Pathology Report Generation
item.description: PathReportEval introduces a standardized benchmark for pathology report generation with a Clinical Report Quality Score metric measuring clinical accuracy beyond lexical similarity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structured Output Collapses Answer Diversity Across 44 Language Models
item.description: Structured Output Collapses Answer Diversity Across 44 Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Search-on-Graph-R1: Training Large Language Models to Search Knowledge Graphs with Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Search-on-Graph-R1: Training Large Language Models to Search Knowledge Graphs with Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reasoning Fine-Tuning Induces Persistent Latent Policy States
item.description: Reasoning Fine-Tuning Induces Persistent Latent Policy States

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Story Shapes the Agent: Narrative Priors in LLM Behavior
item.description: The Story Shapes the Agent: Narrative Priors in LLM Behavior

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] For What Reason? Interpreting Models' Encoding of Causation and Antithesis
item.description: For What Reason? Interpreting Models' Encoding of Causation and Antithesis

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Stochastic Meta-Unlearning: Bridging Language Backbone and Multimodal Unlearning
item.description: Stochastic Meta-Unlearning: Bridging Language Backbone and Multimodal Unlearning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LatentMT: Machine Translation with Latent Reasoning
item.description: LatentMT: Machine Translation with Latent Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Fusion Embedding: A Unified Embedding Space for Text, Image, Video, and Audio
item.description: Fusion Embedding: A Unified Embedding Space for Text, Image, Video, and Audio

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Rationale-Guided Knowledge Distillation for Cross-Lingual Stance Detection
item.description: Rationale-Guided Knowledge Distillation for Cross-Lingual Stance Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Find Before You Fine-Tune: A Diagnostic Study of Small LLMs for Cybersecurity QA
item.description: Find Before You Fine-Tune: A Diagnostic Study of Small LLMs for Cybersecurity QA

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Dual Attention Residuals
item.description: Dual Attention Residuals

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RF-Agent: A Practical Framework for Building Language Agents for RFIC Design
item.description: RF-Agent: A Practical Framework for Building Language Agents for RFIC Design

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CASE: Causal Alignment and Structural Enforcement for Improving Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness
item.description: CASE: Causal Alignment and Structural Enforcement for Improving Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AILQA: Evaluating AI-Driven Legal Question Answering Systems for the Indian Legal System
item.description: AILQA: Evaluating AI-Driven Legal Question Answering Systems for the Indian Legal System

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HPD-Parsing: Hierarchical Parallel Document Parsing
item.description: HPD-Parsing: Hierarchical Parallel Document Parsing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From a Multilingual Streaming ASR Backbone to Kenyan-Language Systems: Data-Centric Adaptation of Nemotron 3.5 for Kikuyu, Dholuo, and Kalenjin
item.description: From a Multilingual Streaming ASR Backbone to Kenyan-Language Systems: Data-Centric Adaptation of Nemotron 3.5 for Kikuyu, Dholuo, and Kalenjin

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reasoning Error from Known Fact: Step-Level Self-Consistency Group Relative Policy Optimization for LLM
item.description: Reasoning Error from Known Fact: Step-Level Self-Consistency Group Relative Policy Optimization for LLM

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Transcription Policy as a Latent Variable: Activating Controllable Verbatim ASR with Word-Level Timing
item.description: Transcription Policy as a Latent Variable: Activating Controllable Verbatim ASR with Word-Level Timing

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Constrained CTC Decoding for Efficient Diacritic Restoration
item.description: Constrained CTC Decoding for Efficient Diacritic Restoration

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Verifiable Self-Evolution for Open-Ended Dialogue Skills via Future-Feedback Prediction
item.description: Verifiable Self-Evolution for Open-Ended Dialogue Skills via Future-Feedback Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AutoJourn: Multi-Perspective Summarisation, Bias Detection and Bias Neutralisation for LLM-Generated News in Automated Journalism
item.description: AutoJourn: Multi-Perspective Summarisation, Bias Detection and Bias Neutralisation for LLM-Generated News in Automated Journalism

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Disentangling Curriculum Learning in NLP: Towards a Unifying Taxonomy
item.description: Disentangling Curriculum Learning in NLP: Towards a Unifying Taxonomy

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FALCON-Discover: Discovering Concentrated False-Confidence Regions for Calibration
item.description: FALCON-Discover identifies localized regions of overconfident errors in ML models through multi-signal discrepancy ranking.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Output-Space Calibration: Spectral Evidence Bundling for Selective Reliability Estimation in Time-Series Classification
item.description: Method improves time-series classification reliability by combining spectral features with output confidence scores, reducing false-confidence errors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Single-Dimensional Compression: The Compound Sparsity Frontier of Large Language Models
item.description: Combining parameter pruning and dynamic token skipping delays large language model performance degradation compared to single-mechanism compression.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ALAS: Additive Learnable Alpha-Stable Kernels for Flexible Bayesian Optimization
item.description: ALAS is a flexible Gaussian Process kernel for Bayesian Optimization that learns alpha-stable spectral components to adapt its smoothness from data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FedCC: A Low-Resource Federated Adaptation of Foundation Models for Robust Corpus Callosum localization in Fetal Ultrasound Images
item.description: FedCC uses federated learning with LoRA modules to localize the corpus callosum in fetal ultrasound without requiring data sharing.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Compressing What Matters: Neuron Importance Meets Data-Aware Low Rank Approximation for Language Model Compression
item.description: Researchers propose combining neuron importance and data-aware low-rank approximation with dynamic compression rate allocation to efficiently compress large language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Edge-Efficient Transformer for End-to-End RF Spectrum Monitoring
item.description: E-SpecFormer, a Transformer with efficient linear attention, enables RF modulation recognition on IoT edge devices with <10k parameters.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Preference-Conditioned Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning for Runtime-Tunable Transit Signal Priority
item.description: Researchers develop a preference-conditioned reinforcement-learning controller for transit signal priority that enables runtime tuning of bus-priority versus overall traffic delay tradeoffs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] BearingNAS: Obtaining In-Sensor Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Systems for Bearings Using a Laptop
item.description: BearingNAS: Obtaining In-Sensor Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Systems for Bearings Using a Laptop

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multi-Timescale Latent-Action DRL for Joint Optimization in Edge-Cloud Networks
item.description: Multi-Timescale Latent-Action DRL for Joint Optimization in Edge-Cloud Networks

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Towards Principled Continual Anomaly Detection: A Systematic Framework and Benchmark Scenarios
item.description: Towards Principled Continual Anomaly Detection: A Systematic Framework and Benchmark Scenarios

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SechKAN: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks with Hyperbolic Secant Functions
item.description: SechKAN: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks with Hyperbolic Secant Functions

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dual-domain fused LSTM modeling for efficient time-dependent reliability analysis
item.description: Dual-domain fused LSTM modeling for efficient time-dependent reliability analysis

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Reliability Scales Inversely: Bigger Models Compound Mistakes Faster via a Hidden Auto-Regressive Risk Regime
item.description: Reliability Scales Inversely: Bigger Models Compound Mistakes Faster via a Hidden Auto-Regressive Risk Regime

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] One Student, Many Teachers: Multi-Task On-Policy Distillation via Soft-Prompt Privileged Context
item.description: One Student, Many Teachers: Multi-Task On-Policy Distillation via Soft-Prompt Privileged Context

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Uncertainty Quantification for AI-Driven Crash Simulation Surrogates: A Comparative Study of Monte Carlo Dropout and Deep Ensemble on Open-Source Bumper Beam Benchmark
item.description: Uncertainty Quantification for AI-Driven Crash Simulation Surrogates: A Comparative Study of Monte Carlo Dropout and Deep Ensemble on Open-Source Bumper Beam Benchmark

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Limits of Support-Preserving Alignment and Bounded Filtering
item.description: On the Limits of Support-Preserving Alignment and Bounded Filtering

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Better Start for Language Models: Domain-Conditional Position Offsets
item.description: A Better Start for Language Models: Domain-Conditional Position Offsets

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TD-DPO: Difference-Aware Preference Optimization for Mitigating Sycophancy in Clinical Autism Intervention Dialogue
item.description: TD-DPO: Difference-Aware Preference Optimization for Mitigating Sycophancy in Clinical Autism Intervention Dialogue

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Information Shadow: Measuring Structural Limits on What Language Models Can Learn
item.description: The Information Shadow: Measuring Structural Limits on What Language Models Can Learn

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gradient-Energy Guided Block-Wise Perturbations for Sharpness-Aware Minimization
item.description: Gradient-Energy Guided Block-Wise Perturbations for Sharpness-Aware Minimization

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Agentic Calibration of Grey-Box Simulation Models: An LLM-Driven Alternative
item.description: Agentic Calibration of Grey-Box Simulation Models: An LLM-Driven Alternative

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spatio-Temporal Prediction of Unsteady Airfoil Aerodynamics Using Augmented Graph Neural Ordinary Differential Equations with Exogenous Controls
item.description: Spatio-Temporal Prediction of Unsteady Airfoil Aerodynamics Using Augmented Graph Neural Ordinary Differential Equations with Exogenous Controls

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Interactive Training 2: Auditable Control Plane for Live Model Training
item.description: Interactive Training 2: Auditable Control Plane for Live Model Training

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cost Accounting for Reactive Computational Graphs: Exhaustive Sweeps, Sequential Mutation, and the Backward-Locality Gap
item.description: Cost Accounting for Reactive Computational Graphs: Exhaustive Sweeps, Sequential Mutation, and the Backward-Locality Gap

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dynamic Loss Balancing for Joint SOH and RUL Prediction of Lithium-Ion Batteries via a Rotary SOH-Injected Prior Battery Transformer
item.description: Dynamic Loss Balancing for Joint SOH and RUL Prediction of Lithium-Ion Batteries via a Rotary SOH-Injected Prior Battery Transformer

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Guided Masked Multi-Task Network for Edge-Friendly Battery Health Diagnostics from Sto-chastically Fragmented Charging Profiles
item.description: Physics-Guided Masked Multi-Task Network for Edge-Friendly Battery Health Diagnostics from Sto-chastically Fragmented Charging Profiles

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ChemHyperMag: Physics-informed magnetic hypergraph learning improves molecular ADMET prediction
item.description: ChemHyperMag: Physics-informed magnetic hypergraph learning improves molecular ADMET prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Federated Lightweight Fine-Tuning
item.description: Federated Lightweight Fine-Tuning
